pageContext.name: Iron Man Mark 7
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Iron Man Mark 7 Life-Size Bust!  Queen Studios have recreated the Mark 7 armor in a static pose while displaying the wind breakers fully engaged for a dynamic look. The suit boasts race-car red, and gold – along with a stand-out silver panel. This armor's ridged design is more distinguishable from later models.   Queen Studios' Mark 7 includes LEDs in both the suit's reactor and eyes, bringing the character to life. The chest plate finishes under the arc reactor, revealing the silver, mechanical insides. On the back, the wind breakers are engaged and arms lifted, displaying intricate details that make the Mark 7 so iconic. The base of the Mark 7 follows a similar design to other Iron Man busts by Queen Studios.   Don't miss your chance to add the Iron Man Mark 7 Bust to your armory!
